description: format, fix common issues, deduplicate, and sort a BibTeX file (offline)
rules: read-only on the input — output written to record_store as formatted.bib
standardizes field order, indentation, page ranges (-- ), author separators ( and ), and DOI prefixes
DEDUPLICATE=1 drops entries with duplicate DOI or citation key
no network — pure stdlib regex parsing
usage: Set BIB_FILE. Optionally SORT_BY (key|year|author|title) and DEDUPLICATE (1). Output: formatted.bib.
limitation: Regex-based parser (not a full BibTeX grammar); only handles brace/quote-delimited single-line fields. Offline only.
